About Welcome to my personal space on the internet. I’m R. Calixto and this is where I share notes, ideas, and projects.
This blog is built with Hugo using the PaperMod theme, hosted entirely for free on GitHub Pages.
Tech Philosophy Simple is better. Markdown wherever possible. Open source always. Automate what repeats. This page is auto-generated. Feel free to edit it with your own bio.

About

Welcome to my personal space on the internet. I’m R. Calixto and this is where I share notes, ideas, and projects.

This blog is built with Hugo using the PaperMod theme, hosted entirely for free on GitHub Pages.

Tech Philosophy

  • Simple is better.
  • Markdown wherever possible.
  • Open source always.
  • Automate what repeats.

This page is auto-generated. Feel free to edit it with your own bio.
title: About

content:
Welcome This is the first post on the new blog. It’s built with Hugo, using the PaperMod theme, and will be hosted on GitHub Pages.
Everything is written in Markdown — no CMS, no database, just plain text files.
Why Hugo? Blazing fast — builds thousands of pages in seconds Single binary — no Node, no Ruby, no Python dependencies Zero-cost hosting — GitHub Pages handles the rest Code Example Here’s a quick test of code syntax highlighting:
def hello(): print("Blog is live!") hello() Stay tuned for more.
summary: Hello world — this is the first post on a Hugo-powered blog with PaperMod theme.
title: First Post — Welcome to the Blog
